name_en: Counter-verified【Top-tier Original】M81538 Purple Suit Wallet Series
name_cn:
Counter-verified【Top-tier Original】M81538 Purple Suit Wallet Series
Suit wallet with cowhide leather trim. LV is renowned for its exquisite craftsmanship, combining rare designs and special leathers with innovative technology and classic styles. The Monogram purple leather suit wallet highlights the presence of the Louis Vuitton world. The wallet features a unique interior design with various pockets and credit card slots.
Size: 19×10 cm
